headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Bunge (BG) EPS Upgrade After Viterra Synergies And New Buyback
summary: Bunge Global SA reported past first-quarter 2026 results with sales rising to US$21.86 billion while net income fell to US$68 million, reducing basic earnings per share from continuing operations to US$0.35. Despite the revenue miss versus analyst expectations, Bunge Global’s strong soybean and softseed processing performance after the Viterra integration led management to raise full-year adjusted EPS guidance and authorize a new US$3.00 billion share repurchase program. We’ll now examine...
